# enum / inline

The **enum** (select) type's `data-view.cell-editor` capability.

Contributes `DataViewSlots.CellEditor({ match: "enum", ... })` — a compact
`EnumEditor`: an open-by-default `InlinePopover` whose content is a single-select
vertical list of `ToggleChip` rows over `field.options`. Choosing an option
commits its value and closes; dismissing the popover cancels.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Enum (select) field type: data-view inline cell editor (single-select chip popover).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `DataViewSlots.CellEditor` "enum" → `EnumEditor`
  - Uses: `primitives/data-view.DataViewSlots`, `primitives/popover.InlinePopover`, `primitives/toggle-chip.ToggleChip`
